subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards the Kingdom's realm! Now, seated by the Sea of Galilee, thou art detached from all save the Friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بجهان ملکوت الآن در کنار دریاچۀ طبریا نشسته و حال از غیر دوست گسسته
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
